title: Re-summarise every fold of a completed MNL cv-fit run
summary: Finalize every per-fold run produced by cv-fit. Walks the fold subdirectories under run_dir, runs finalize on each, and writes aggregate cross-validation metrics (mean and standard deviation of train and holdout log-likelihood) to cv_summary.json and cv_summary.csv at the top level of run_dir.
description: The cross-validation counterpart of `finalize`. Walks every per-fold subdirectory under an existing `cv-fit` `run_dir`, re-runs `finalize` on each, and rewrites the aggregate `cv_summary.csv` and `cv_summary.json` at the top level. Pure post-processing — no refitting.
usage:
[["model-lg::cv-finalize"]]
run_dir = "<existing cv run dir>"
run_name = "lg_run"
# optional:
export_dir = "exports"

arguments.name: run_dir
arguments.description: Top-level CV run directory containing per-fold subdirectories. Each fold subdirectory must contain a completed MNL fit checkpoint (the layout `cv-fit` produces).

arguments.name: run_name
arguments.description: Short identifier for this run. Non-empty string. Used to name output artifacts and subdirectories so multiple runs under the same run_dir do not collide. Must not contain path separators or '..'.

arguments.name: export_dir
arguments.description: Per-fold export subdirectory name. Resolved as `{fold_dir}/{export_dir}`. Default `exports`. Override only if you want to keep multiple finalisations side-by-side.

details:
`cv-finalize` is a thin wrapper around per-fold `finalize` calls plus aggregation. For each fold subdirectory under `run_dir`, it re-derives the per-fold summary, then computes the aggregate train and holdout log-likelihood (mean ± standard deviation across folds) and rewrites the top-level `cv_summary.csv` and `cv_summary.json`.

Like its single-run counterpart, this command is idempotent and cheap. The persisted per-fold state is not modified. `cv-fit` calls `cv-finalize` automatically at the end of a successful run, so you only need to invoke this command directly when you want to regenerate the exports or write them to a side-by-side directory.
value:
On success:

- Each per-fold subdirectory has its `exports/` (or `{export_dir}/`) regenerated with `summary.json` and `coefficients.csv`.
- The top-level `run_dir` contains updated `cv_summary.csv` and `cv_summary.json` with per-fold and aggregate train / holdout log-likelihood.

In protocol mode the plugin emits `event.run.started`, then per-fold finalize events, then `event.run.finished` (or `event.run.failed`).
notes: `cv-finalize` does not refit — it only re-summarises existing fit checkpoints.
Use `export_dir` to keep multiple finalisations side-by-side without overwriting each other.

see_also.description: Initial CV run — calls `cv-finalize` automatically at the end.

examples.title: Re-finalise an existing MNL CV run
Write per-fold exports to a side-by-side subdirectory

fields.name: run_dir
fields.description: Top-level CV run directory containing per-fold subdirectories.

fields.name: run_name
fields.description: Short identifier for this run. Non-empty string. Used to name output artifacts and subdirectories so multiple runs under the same run_dir do not collide. Must not contain path separators or '..'.

fields.name: export_dir
fields.description: Per-fold export subdirectory name. Resolved as {fold_dir}/{export_dir}. Default: "exports".
